task.description: Replace the SHA-256 implementation in hash_password() with bcrypt (cost factor 12). Keep the function signature unchanged.
constraints: Do not change the public signature hash_password(plain: str) -> str
Do not add new dependencies other than bcrypt (already in requirements)
Do not touch any other file

files.content:
from auth.security import hash_password, verify_password

def test_roundtrip():
    h = hash_password('hunter2')
    assert verify_password('hunter2', h)
    assert not verify_password('wrong', h)
files.reason: DoD test the change must satisfy

context.notes: verify_password must keep working after the change — bcrypt.checkpw, not string equality.

acceptance_criteria: hash output is a bcrypt hash, not a hex digest
